creator: mokr@mokr.ru
text:
It seems, that problem is related to statically compiled in kernel
COMPAT_LINUX staff...

Had the same problem, after commenting out 'options COMPAT_LINUX' it
disappeared (not sure when it was introduced, my previous kernel
is dated June, 17 and does not have COMPAT_LINUX compiled in).

Sources updated on September, 8, 23:20 MSD (GMT-4)


Sincerely yours,
Sergey Mokryshev
